title: Resource APIs, Pagination, Idempotency, and Concurrency Control · Execution Trace: Cursor Pagination Order
summary: A list endpoint skips and duplicates rows during concurrent writes, create retries duplicate charges, PATCH silently overwrites fields, and response schemas expose storage columns. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsgo cursor pagination order increment in stable resource and mutation consistency contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Build opaque cursor pagination from a unique stable order, bound page size, preserve filters and authorization, and test inserts and deletes between pages.
Define stable transport schemas, domain models, persistence records, optional and null semantics, field ownership, and evolution boundaries separately.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
